mapper.sql: SELECT P.* FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM , PAGING.* FROM (
mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) total FROM ad_user_conn_log a ,ad_user_mst b ,ad_comm_cd c ,(select * from ad_comm_cd where comm_grp_cd = 'EDMP_MGMT_CD') d WHERE 1=1 AND a.user_id = b.user_id AND a.user_work_fg_cd = c.comm_cd AND a.edmp_mgmt_cd = d.comm_cd(+) AND b.use_yn != 'N' AND c.use_yn != 'N' AND c.comm_grp_cd = 'USER_WORK_FG_CD'
AND a.user_conn_date < TO_DATE(#{startDt}||'23:59:59','yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND a.user_conn_date > TO_DATE(#{startDt}||'23:59:59','yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND a.user_conn_date between TO_DATE(#{startDt}||'00:00:00','yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS') and TO_DATE(#{endDt}||'23:59:59','yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND a.user_work_fg_cd = #{selectWorkFg}
AND a.edmp_mgmt_cd = #{selectSystem}
AND b.user_nm LIKE '%' || #{userNm} || '%'
ORDER BY a.user_conn_date DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(a.user_conn_date,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') "등록일시" ,'EDMP' "시스템구분" ,c.cd_nm "작업구분" ,b.user_nm "사용자" ,a.user_conn_ipaddr "사용자 IP" ,a.user_work_cts "작업내용" FROM ad_user_conn_log a ,ad_user_mst b ,ad_comm_cd c ,(select * from ad_comm_cd where comm_grp_cd = 'EDMP_MGMT_CD') d WHERE 1=1 AND a.user_id = b.user_id AND a.user_work_fg_cd = c.comm_cd AND a.edmp_mgmt_cd = d.comm_cd(+) AND b.use_yn != 'N' AND c.use_yn != 'N' AND c.comm_grp_cd = 'USER_WORK_FG_CD'
AND a.user_conn_date < TO_DATE(#{startDt}||'23:59:59','yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND a.user_conn_date > TO_DATE(#{startDt}||'23:59:59','yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND a.user_conn_date between TO_DATE(#{startDt}||'00:00:00','yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS') and TO_DATE(#{endDt}||'23:59:59','yyyyMMdd HH24:MI:SS')
AND a.user_work_fg_cd = #{selectWorkFg}
AND a.edmp_mgmt_cd = #{selectSystem}
AND b.user_nm LIKE '%' || #{userNm} || '%'
ORDER BY a.user_conn_date DESC
